description: A responsive grid of three equal-width cards displayed side-by-side on desktop, stacking to a single column on mobile. Each card contains an image, text content, and a CTA link.

FR-01.title: Three-Column Grid Layout
FR-01.description: The block MUST render three cards in a horizontal row on desktop.

FR-02.title: Card Content
FR-02.description: Each card MUST contain an image, text content, and a CTA link.
acceptance: CTA link at bottom of card

FR-03.title: Card Link
FR-03.description: Each card SHOULD be a clickable link navigating to a detail page.

FR-04.title: Responsive Stacking
FR-04.description: Cards MUST stack vertically on tablet and mobile.

A.description: Simple card with image, a description paragraph, and a navigation link. No heading within the card.
usedOn: Homepage (Culture section - Science, Learning & Development, Partnerships)

additionalRequirements.FR-A01: No heading element inside the card.
additionalRequirements.FR-A02: Description text provides the card context.
additionalRequirements.FR-A03: Link label indicates the destination section (e.g., 'SCIENCE', 'Learning and Development').

B.description: Richer card with image, H2 heading, description paragraph, and a 'Learn more' CTA link. Used as teaser cards for sub-sections.
usedOn: Sustainability Hub (AbbVie Foundation, Disaster Relief, ESG)

additionalRequirements.FR-B03: 'Learn more' CTA at the bottom of each card.

accessibility.AC-01: Cards MUST have appropriate heading hierarchy within the page
accessibility.AC-02: Card links MUST have descriptive accessible names
accessibility.AC-03: Images MUST have meaningful alt text
accessibility.AC-04: Grid MUST maintain logical reading order when stacked
